'''loyadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yappish|yappish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yappish|yappish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| loyadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:loyadhithi|loyadhithi]] || [[word:loyadhiji|loyadhiji]] || [[word:loyadhishi|loyadhishi]] || [[word:loyadhiki|loyadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:loyadhuthuthu|loyadhuthuthu]] || [[word:loyadhujuju|loyadhujuju]] || [[word:loyadhushushu|loyadhushushu]] || [[word:loyadhukuku|loyadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:loyadhuthu|loyadhuthu]] || [[word:loyadhuju|loyadhuju]] || [[word:loyadhushu|loyadhushu]] || [[word:loyadhuku|loyadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:loyadhufthuf|loyadhufthuf]] || [[word:loyadhufjuf|loyadhufjuf]] || [[word:loyadhufshuf|loyadhufshuf]] || [[word:loyadhufkuf|loyadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:loyadhethe|loyadhethe]] || [[word:loyadheje|loyadheje]] || [[word:loyadheshe|loyadheshe]] || [[word:loyadheke|loyadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:loyadhothotho|loyadhothotho]] || [[word:loyadhojojo|loyadhojojo]] || [[word:loyadhoshosho|loyadhoshosho]] || [[word:loyadhokoko|loyadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:loyadhotho|loyadhotho]] || [[word:loyadhojo|loyadhojo]] || [[word:loyadhosho|loyadhosho]] || [[word:loyadhoko|loyadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:loyadhofthof|loyadhofthof]] || [[word:loyadhofjof|loyadhofjof]] || [[word:loyadhofshof|loyadhofshof]] || [[word:loyadhofkof|loyadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfthĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfjĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfshĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfkĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfthĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfjĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfshĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfkĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfthĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfjĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfshĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loyadhĂŻfkĂŻf|loyadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:loyadhĂŠthĂŠ|loyadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:loyadhĂŠjĂŠ|loyadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:loyadhĂŠshĂŠ|loyadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:loyadhĂŠkĂŠ|loyadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:loyadhathatha|loyadhathatha]] || [[word:loyadhajaja|loyadhajaja]] || [[word:loyadhashasha|loyadhashasha]] || [[word:loyadhakaka|loyadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:loyadhatha|loyadhatha]] || [[word:loyadhaja|loyadhaja]] || [[word:loyadhasha|loyadhasha]] || [[word:loyadhaka|loyadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:loyadhafthaf|loyadhafthaf]] || [[word:loyadhafjaf|loyadhafjaf]] || [[word:loyadhafshaf|loyadhafshaf]] || [[word:loyadhafkaf|loyadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:loyadhasha|loyadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:loyadhshĂ«sha|loyadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loyadhrosha|loyadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loyadhmusha|loyadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:loyadhyasha|loyadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloyadhnkshĂ«sha|goloyadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloyadhnkrosha|goloyadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloyadhnkmusha|goloyadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloyadhnkyasha|goloyadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:loyayadhasha|loyayadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loyayadhshĂ«sha|loyayadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loyayadhrosha|loyayadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loyayadhmusha|loyayadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loyayadhyasha|loyayadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloyayadhnkshĂ«sha|goloyayadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloyayadhnkrosha|goloyayadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloyayadhnkmusha|goloyayadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloyayadhnkyasha|goloyayadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:leyĂŠdhasha|leyĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:leyĂŠdhshĂ«sha|leyĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:leyĂŠdhrosha|leyĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:leyĂŠdhmusha|leyĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:leyĂŠdhyasha|leyĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goleyĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|goleyĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goleyĂŠdhnkrosha|goleyĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goleyĂŠdhnkmusha|goleyĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goleyĂŠdhnkyasha|goleyĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:loyfadhasha|loyfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loyfadhshĂ«sha|loyfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loyfadhrosha|loyfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loyfadhmusha|loyfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loyfadhyasha|loyfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloyfadhnkshĂ«sha|goloyfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloyfadhnkrosha|goloyfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloyfadhnkmusha|goloyfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloyfadhnkyasha|goloyfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
